mapper.sql: hb.id, hb.city_id, c.name AS city_name, hb.region, hb.title, hb.subtitle, hb.image_url, hb.link_url, hb.enabled, hb.sort_no
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM home_banner hb LEFT JOIN city c ON c.id = hb.city_id AND c.region = hb.region WHERE hb.region = #{region}
AND (hb.city_id IS NULL OR hb.city_id = #{cityId})
ORDER BY hb.sort_no ASC, hb.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO home_banner( id, city_id, region, title, subtitle, image_url, link_url, enabled, sort_no ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{cityId}, #{region}, #{title}, #{subtitle}, #{imageUrl}, #{linkUrl}, #{enabled}, #{sortNo} )
